creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #66)
> Problems with boost + compiler:c++11-lang on FreeBSD 9 should not be new other
> than in ports that were patched to add -lboost_system for compatibility with
> the new version of boost.

BTW, adding '-lboost_system' to LDFLAGS is usually not necessary.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207015#c2
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207016#c2
